name: OnMostTxLight
title: OnMostTxLight
description: The event procedure is called as soon as the light status of the fibre optical transmitter (FOT) is switched.
The event procedure is only called if the light status has been switched by the application (see also mostSetTxLight).

parameters.description: FOT enabled: TimingMaster: Modulated light on TimingSlave/Bypass: Tx light = Rx light
